perf-color-temp-cache-2026-07-16.description: Cache s_coolColor/s_warmColor as static readonly; extract static LerpColor method; cache last midColor with _cachedTempColor/_cachedColorTemperature; static JsonSerializerOptions in AppSettings. 0 errors, 0 warnings.

eng-updatum-globaljson-2026-07-16.description: Bump Updatum 1.2.1 to 1.4.0; add global.json with rollForward:latestMinor pinned to 10.0.109. 0 errors, 0 warnings.

test-appsettings-v2-2026-07-15.description: 37 xUnit tests for AppSettings (default values, round-trip, corrupted JSON, partial JSON, trailing comma/comments, SaveTo directory creation). LoadFrom/SaveTo internal overloads added. All 37 pass.

fix-settings-monitor-workarea-2026-07-15.description: SettingsWindow used SystemParameters.WorkArea (primary monitor only). Now uses Screen.FromHandle+VisualTreeHelper.GetDpi to get correct monitor bounds. 0 errors, 0 warnings.

fix-settings-stale-slider-2026-07-14.description: Fix SettingsWindow_Closing using stale slider value instead of actual mainWindow brightness/temp. 0 errors, 0 warnings.

perf-geometry-cache-2026-07-14.description: Cache EllipseGeometry+CombinedGeometry per context (~250 allocs/sec on mouse move) + static JsonSerializerOptions in AppSettings.Save(). 0 errors, 0 warnings.

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: GitHub Actions cannot create PRs - needs Settings > Actions > General > Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs workflows permission.
known_limitations.build: Project targets net10.0-windows; build requires -p:EnableWindowsTargeting=true on Linux CI. Test project targets net8.0 to avoid this.

notes: 2026-07-16 01:13 run: Tasks 8+4. Task 8: cache s_coolColor/s_warmColor static readonly, extract LerpColor static method, add GetTemperatureColor() cache (_cachedTempColor/_cachedColorTemperature), static JsonSerializerOptions in AppSettings. Task 4: bump Updatum 1.2.1->1.4.0, add global.json (rollForward:latestMinor, 10.0.109 baseline). Both branches submitted. No test project in current master.
